metadata.source_location: SharePoint - MDMInternal / RRSR and NVR Portal

faqs.question: What is this portal for?
alternate_phrasings: what does the supplier registration portal do
faqs.answer: The Supplier Registration Portal is used for onboarding new Merchandise (Trading) Vendors with Reliance Retail.

faqs.question: What is the link to the supplier registration portal?
alternate_phrasings: where do I register as a supplier
faqs.answer: You can access the portal at https://supplierregistration.ril.com/

faqs.question: How do I start a new supplier registration?
alternate_phrasings: where to click for new registration
faqs.answer: Visit https://supplierregistration.ril.com/ and click the 'New Supplier Registration' button on the right side panel of the page.

faqs.question: How many steps are there in the registration process?
faqs.answer: There are 7 steps: (1) Visit Portal Page, (2) Supplier PAN Details, (3) Office Address Details, (4) Contact Details, (5) Select Product Category and Format, (6) Accept Terms and Conditions, and (7) Request ID Generation.

faqs.question: What are the validation rules for PAN?
faqs.answer: Your PAN must follow these rules: (1) Must be exactly 10 characters long, (2) First 5 characters must be alphabets, (3) 4th character must be one of C, P, H, F, A, T, B, L, J, or G, (4) 6th to 9th characters must be numeric, (5) Last character must be an alphabet.

entities.value: C, P, H, F, A, T, B, L, J, G

faqs.question: What does the 4th character of my PAN signify?
alternate_phrasings: what does P in PAN mean
what does C in PAN mean
faqs.answer: The 4th character indicates the entity type: C - Company, P - Individual, H - Hindu Undivided Family (HUF), F - Firm or Limited Liability Partnership, A - Association of Persons (AOP), T - Trust, B - Body of Individuals (BOI), L - Local Authority, J - Artificial Juridical Person, G - Government Agency.

faqs.question: The Title field is blank after entering my PAN. What should I do?
alternate_phrasings: PAN entered but title is missing
faqs.answer: The Title field is auto-populated from the 4th character of your PAN. If it doesn't populate, remove the PAN and retype it.

faqs.question: How should I declare my PAN name?
alternate_phrasings: how to write name as per PAN
faqs.answer: Declare the PAN name exactly as per your PAN card. Ensure the 'Y' flag is displayed in the PAN name validation.

faqs.question: What file format is accepted for the PAN document upload?
alternate_phrasings: can I upload JPG for PAN
faqs.answer: Upload a scanned copy or E-PAN file in PDF or JPG format.

faqs.question: I am a Proprietorship Firm. What additional document do I need?
alternate_phrasings: PAN with P 4th character what documents
faqs.answer: If your 4th PAN character is 'P' and your Vendor name/Bank account name differs from the Proprietor's name, you must merge a Proof of Proprietorship document with your PAN copy. Accepted documents are: (1) Shop & Establishment Certificate, (2) Confirmation letter from a scheduled Bank stating proprietorship, (3) Service Tax Registration Certificate, (4) IEC (Import Export Certificate), (5) Trade License, (6) Any Govt./Local authority certificate showing both firm and proprietor name, (7) UDYAM Registration Certificate, (8) GST Certificate.

faqs.question: Is the RTGS mandate form valid as proof of proprietorship?
alternate_phrasings: can I use RTGS form as proof
faqs.answer: No. The RTGS mandate form is not accepted. Banks only validate signature and account number on it and do not confirm other details. Please use one of the other accepted proof documents.

faqs.question: I am a farmer. How do I declare this?
faqs.answer: Click 'Yes' on the farmer option and attach a supporting document to establish your status as a farmer.

faqs.question: What is the format for the UDYAM (MSME) number?
faqs.answer: The UDYAM number must follow this format: UDYAM-XX-XX-XXXXXXX. It is 19 characters long. First 5 characters: 'UDYAM'. Next 2: alphabetic letters (A-Z) for state. Next 2: numeric digits for district code. Last 7: numeric digits unique to the enterprise. Each part is separated by a hyphen.

faqs.question: Where do I find the Date of Issue for UDYAM?
alternate_phrasings: which date to enter for UDYAM
faqs.answer: Refer to the 'Date of UDYAM Registration' section on your UDYAM (MSME) certificate and select the matching date from the calendar in the 'Date of Issue' field.

faqs.question: What should I enter in the Validity Year From and To fields?
faqs.answer: In the 'From' field, enter the latest classification date from the Enterprise Type section of your UDYAM certificate. In the 'To' field, enter 9999.

faqs.question: How can I verify my UDYAM number?
faqs.answer: You can verify it at https://udyamregistration.gov.in/Udyam_Verify.aspx

faqs.question: In what format should I upload the UDYAM certificate?
faqs.answer: Upload the scanned copy of the UDYAM (MSME) certificate in PDF or JPG format.

faqs.question: What address should I provide in the Office Address section?
faqs.answer: Provide your Supplier Address (Registered Office Address) details and click Next.

faqs.question: How do I verify my mobile number?
faqs.answer: Enter your mobile number and click the 'Get OTP' button. You will receive an OTP for verification.

faqs.question: Can I use a Reliance employee's contact details?
faqs.answer: No. Reliance employee contact details are strictly prohibited in the registration.

faqs.question: How do I select the correct product category and format?
faqs.answer: Choose the appropriate category and format from the dropdowns. Please seek guidance from the Reliance Buyer you are coordinating with to ensure the correct selection.

faqs.question: Can I select multiple product categories?
faqs.answer: Yes. After selecting a category and format, click 'Add Product Category' on the right side. You may add more than one category and format.

faqs.question: When are FSSAI details required?
faqs.answer: The system will prompt for FSSAI details if applicable based on your selected category. You can also add multiple FSSAI license entries.

faqs.question: How do I complete the registration?
faqs.answer: Read the terms and conditions, check the 'I accept terms and conditions' box, and click the 'Register' button.

faqs.question: What happens after I submit the registration?
faqs.answer: A Request ID will be generated and assigned for future reference. A notification email will also be sent to your registered email and to the Business team for further processing.

faqs.question: How can I check my registration status?
faqs.answer: Click on the 'Check Registration Status' option on the portal, enter your PAN in the search window, and click 'Search' to view your business approval status.

faqs.question: Should I check my status before re-registering?
faqs.answer: Yes. Always check your registration status through the 'Check Registration Status' option before initiating a fresh registration.

faqs.question: What happens once my request is approved?
faqs.answer: Once approved by the Category and Commercial Managers, login credentials will be sent to your registered email via an auto-generated email. Click the link in the Activation Email, set your password, and submit.

fallback.answer: I'm not sure about that specific question. Please check the Supplier Registration Manual or contact your Reliance Buyer for assistance. You can also check your registration status at https://supplierregistration.ril.com/
